name: Sugared Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Fresh asparagus, cut into 2-inch pieces (about 4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium-high heat, melt the butter and brown sugar until dissolved.
2. Add the asparagus and sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the chicken broth; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat, cover, and simmer for 8-10 minutes or until the asparagus is crisp-tender.
5. Remove the asparagus to a serving dish and keep warm.
6. Cook the sauce uncovered until reduced by half.
7. Pour over the asparagus and serve immediately.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE (MAKE IT WORK!!!)
Serves: 4-6
